storyboard.content: I have chest pain that feels like something very heavy is pressing down on my chest and it won't go away.
The pain is also spreading into my jaw and my left shoulder.
I'm sweating a lot and feel dizzy and weak.
This has been going on for about 2 hours and it's not getting any better no matter what I do.
The pain is an 8 out of 10. I can't find any position that makes it feel better and I'm really scared.
I'm a 67-year-old man with a history of heart disease and I take aspirin and cholesterol medication every day.
